channel.title: U.S. Financial News, Markets, Banking and Business — Investment Banking
channel.description: Latest U.S. market news, banking updates, business insights, investigations, and real-time analysis to keep you informed on key financial developments

item.title: Melat Kiros Defeats Incumbent Diana DeGette in Colorado Democratic Primary Upset
item.description:
Melat Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist, has defeated longtime incumbent Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado’s Democratic primary in a major political upset.

Key points:
• Melat Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist, defeats long-time incumbent Rep. Diana DeGette in Colorado’s Democratic primary.
• The victory signals a generational and ideological shift toward progressive politics in a traditionally Democratic stronghold.
• Kiros campaigned on housing affordability, economic inequality, and challenging establishment Democratic leadership.
• Analysts expect Kiros to be heavily favoured in the general election, marking a broader trend of progressive primary gains.

Read the full article: Melat Kiros Defeats Incumbent Diana DeGette in Colorado Democratic Primary Upset
